twitch_info.title: hard grinds then maybe starting a fangame today

message.body: poop_bike is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: hard grinds then maybe starting a fangame today
i pooped for you earlier today sir bike o7
Barfyace watched 5 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! hope u win
do the good hentai EX secret boss
ngl this avoidance looks amazing but too hard
yeah i downloaded the razzor practice version to try it after watching u play
i mean there was no chance i was getting here in k2w lol
im stuck at boss 1 in k3 btw
i did check it out but i got turned off after finding out its the same tile set different colors
i mean doesnt it use like a specific tileset for the entire game?
@quadstuffed what are you stuffing four times anyway
poop did you know leveling has to pay me $10 cad cuz im just so good at i wanna
quad could never beat me in a speedrun
basically he set a bounty, beat a level in an amount of time and u get 10$ cad
you can also compete for more money but thats actually hard
the level isn't hard, but doing it fast is hard
the map has to be beaten in under 17.5 seconds
fortunately the only people that even have access to the level are  kinda bad iwm players
shots fired at gameguy and mudspud and maxwell
no, i knew people could do it
the whole point was to make it achievable
if prizes are top-heavy, you just make it so like three players can even compete
it just makes it so there's no point in worse players even playing
so give prizes that give other players a chance
kinda like weight classes in boxing
you have to do hard strats to clear the level fast enough to earn money
that would be a shit map
its like 20 seconds of maybe 70-80 diff needle idk
i know how to make precise things that aren't named-jump spam
you just have no time to set things up if you're speedrunning, so it feels harder
hey, i just met you, and this is crazy, but here's my number, so call me it
delfruit tags say there's a secret
bonk jumps separate the men from the boys
this is my jam turn it up
This block design and song reminds me of your average L game
Goodluck with whatever your planning for today
is this what being a foreign pathogen trying to infect the body is like?
your one braincell trying to do its task
a lot of people dont like this avoidance
llithospheree watched 10 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! what did u say
i was probably gonna do i wanna be the internet angel as my next avoidance
Shy_Bay watched 15 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak! aaaaa
you think you can just go by calling me it??
is this the main game or ex?
I mean the first boss was the autoscroller thing
poopbike when he sees anything resembling platforming:
unless that's like targeted you could have been further right
hey we made it out of phase 1
dark boshy thought he was regular boshy for me
and started doing the boshy attacks
more gravity MORE. we must recreate facescraper
yeah last attempt I actually had to fight the moon
so the boss had less hp left
I got shot by the trademarked boshy foot gun
if it's just the machine gun it might be fine
he's shooting me from his feet too
jump key broke can do spike 4.5's now
you can but you need to like pause the game and stuff
the thing with 4.5s is you only just barely get high enough to land. no way you have enough time to actually manouver your whole 11 pixel wide ass over the 2 pixels of spike
its its like an upspike halfway in the block i think youd be good cause youd land
regularly yeah you can't, but with pause trick you can get enough height
you can bhop to get enough valign to make up for the unshift to rejump. or you can pause at your peak. unjump, unpause+rejump
theres probably some script somewhere but i wouldnt know where to find it
numlock+either left or right alt works after a bit
you have to like try it a few times though
anywho, naptime. gluck cooping. ill see if theres a poop for you before bed o7
just try all the keys one of them'll work
i just farted, so probably no poop twerkies
you didn't tell me to watch out for starfruit
yeah how does it have 3 touhou's and none of them are infinite jump
this boss feels like it just lacked playtesting
Blurg33 just raided the channel with 2 viewers PogChamp
I have not been able to take the last two session in a positive way at all
Swapped 3 games in 1 hour and quit them all
Gl on this boss and Gl to opanker aswell
I tried to move out early
well it should be synced because we kill boshy at the same time
Exactly how i felt this stream
This golden stage save in cn3 is really getting to me
Have had about 12 chokes past the hard part
Opanker entering godmode every time this part hits
I'm simply pausing the game idk why the sun gets so mad at that
Does not help that since im playing on very hard that every save is double the length, so each time i have to clear the "first" save like minimum 100 times
The save before that i had cleared the first half of the save (which is a whole save) what i assume to be over 300 times
sometimes the higher difficulties are reasonable challenges
There is only medium and very hard
@Blurg33 yeah you have to be prepared for this if you're playing something on a higher difficulty
The diff of 90-100 is harder then what you find in very hard
Just irratating to choke to jumps i know are consistent when it really matters
But floor 70-90 are a save per TWO floors
But i am getting the hardest part of very hard done pre floor 80-90
Golden stage is infamously a lot harder in very hard just for how its designed
Still easier then the ending part of the game tho funnily enough
And some floors before that is also difficult
Oh yeah im also failing at kamilia stage in k3 😭
I feel too dumb and tone deaf to do it
I kind of cheated the minesweeper so i dont count it
I have never picked up an instrument
Nah not as much as i did
You could play it normally but it would actually take me much longer
I might come back and do so
Never picked up an instrument so im like
So im like "Ahh i think it was a tone lighter and thats uhhh left???"
Except i dont know the tones at all
you don't need to know the tones, you get to hear them constantly while playing
Dude if it was a math game instead i would be better off
@opanker_ True but it still too much
I sometimes cant tell well enough
@opanker_ Who put math in my fangame
I take my previous message back
Oh well ill come back to cn3 either later today or tommorow
Ill record instead probably aswell since i dont like clicking the live button more then once a day
I think ill just make it alphebetical
Dont tune in when im doing the minesweeper part in cn3
I learned minesweeper for some game
And it was for like a day
I think ill seriously end with like 400 hours when i beat cn3
Is the bosses hp scaled up in multi?
Would make sense cause its not often both players make it to the end
yeah those gaps are like way too small
it did not look free at all
What if they added red phase colonel at the end of this fight?
I hope extra has  a lot of double upwards planes and decession save 9's
Dont forget the Leehee triple diamond at the end of this avoidance
There should be like a shine and bright dice with the most diabolical infamous jumps
@Blurg33 no that one's a bit too hard
@opanker_ Well i mean it could be more consistent then a decession save 9
hell no it's not more consistent than ds9
Some dude somehow did 12 Leehee triple diamonds in a row
Yes but its like a needle save
k3+ makes you do entire screens
One for the save and one for the twist
But apperently some of it is so fucked that its not even worth it
@Blurg33 I meant flow last save, leehe triple diamond is absolutely more doable yeah
Will spend the next two hours watching this stream while trying to do 10 ceiling double diamonds
My pb is 6 in a row
Im sure i can break it Kappa
@Blurg33 finally, somebody making good use of their time
"We can both make it there" Kappa Kappa Kappa
Ok not good consistency so far
he already got banned from someones chat because of speaking Spanish when they told him not to
@migvm11 It is set as english tbf
If im wrong then im sorry
he has like two chats he's unbanned him I think we should spare him for now
Wait a ceiling double harder or easier than a normal double
Yes there is one i know but i forgot his name
@Blurg33 unless you find 6f 1f to be easier, it's objectively harder
Well i dont know frames well enough to know what im doing
To me they feel the same
if you do bhop 5f 1f, it's even the same as a double invert
But doing 10 bhops in a row is a death wish
No hay casi streamers españoles que jueguen plataformas:(
Maybe not cause mudspud is mad consistent at them
His super f consistency is diabolical
@migvm11 You have the GD community if you like
They have a lot of spanish players
I think mudspud did 30 in a row
yeah bhopping gives you an extra frame
It took me an hour to do 5 in a row twice
the only difficulty is just getting the 5 frame
I think there is one for a skip
with bhopping, you can either move a frame late or jump a frame late
there are zero super F's in destination
Just did 5 in a row again
I thought it was a v-align type of thing
But i has more to it i can see
Len and final boss are the main hard ones
@migvm11 I can get that with guitarhero but a lot of them are chill
Luka could be annoying speedrun wise tho
Dying to final is big time loss
And final has some bs moments
nah final is consistent in luka
it's the gray cherries that are an issue in speedruns
Atleast from Nal's words rarely it could be fucked
I mean if you can get up to the top it should be fine
getting there can be a problem though depending on how you start
But with experience its pretty consistent i think
That would be the final boss
Todos los españoles juegan juegos de mierda
Avoidance and boss is same thing to me
If it has pattern then i could see the argument
So i would probably be the person to make that argument
is like the most complicated pattern in the game
yeah but going to the left takes time
also I did just teleport during dark boshy that wasn't lag
there isn't a whole lot you can do when you're on the right and the stars are aiming at you horizontally from the left
omg we both made it to shine and bright
Dicen que el iwm es una mierda porque son re mancos
okay so you seem consistent at getting to the final phase
lmao boshy aimed one of his shots at me
I did like a bat plane
don't mind me I'm just waiting for the right moment to attack
Did not even see you LMao
oh I also beat the game deathless
my keys aren't big either but I guess I'm both used to it and my fingers are small
I do have some stuff to do so maybe we can continue this next time
Co-op Final Boss: Shine and Bright
